property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/148.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: SponsorDetail should call clearDetail when isNew is true
SponsorDetail canSaveProfile should be true when form is valid in new mode
SponsorDetail canSaveProfile should be false when required fields are empty in new mode
SponsorDetail should load profile, seasons, payments when sponsorProfileId is set
SponsorDetail canSaveProfile should be false when form is pristine (no changes)
SponsorDetail canSaveProfile should be true when form is dirty and valid in edit mode
SponsorDetail should call saveProfile on service when onSaveProfile is called with valid form
SponsorDetail should not call saveProfile when canSaveProfile is false
SponsorDetail should emit closed event when onCancel is called
SponsorDetail canSavePayment should be false when amount is null or zero
SponsorDetail canSavePayment should be true when amount is positive
SponsorDetail totalPayments should sum all payment amounts
